The complete text of this release is attached hereto as Exhibit 99.1 and is incorporated herein by reference.

In August 2011, Entergy entered into a settlement agreement with the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) relating to the mark-to-market income tax treatment of various wholesale electric power purchase and sale agreements, including Entergy Louisiana's contract to purchase electricity from the Vidalia hydroelectric facility.
A copy of discussion materials that will be used at the EEI Conference is attached as Exhibit 99.1 to this Form 8-K and is incorporated herein.
